recommendations.title: Playback
recommendations.overview: While digging into their town's infamous past, a group of high school students unwittingly unlock an even darker secret. Now, an evil spirit has been awakened and will stop at nothing to find his true heir.

recommendations.title: Spetters
recommendations.overview: Amateur dirt-bikers Rien and Hans–and their mechanic Eef–each fall in love with Fientje, a young woman who, with her brother Jaap, works a concession stand at the races. Everyone seeks a better life: Fientje wants out of the business and away from Ja

recommendations.title: Victoria
recommendations.overview: A young Spanish woman who has newly moved to Berlin finds her flirtation with a local guy turn potentially deadly as their night out with his friends reveals a dangerous secret.

recommendations.title: Mother Joan of the Angels
recommendations.overview: A Polish priest arrives at a convent hoping to save the Mother Superior who is supposedly possessed by eight demons.

recommendations.title: Schindler's List
recommendations.overview: The true story of how businessman Oskar Schindler saved over a thousand Jewish lives from the Nazis while they worked as slaves in his factory during World War II.

recommendations.title: Sleepaway Camp II: Unhappy Campers
recommendations.overview: Angela Baker escapes from a mental hospital and surfaces at a summer camp as a counselor who lectures her teenage charges on proper moral behavior. Those teens who break her strict rules -- from the camp chatterbox or a sex-obsessed girl to the boys

recommendations.title: Sleepaway Camp III: Teenage Wasteland
recommendations.overview: Psychotic Angela is itching to do what she does best: slaughter dozens of teenage campers. As luck would have it, the previous site of her murders has been renamed and converted into an experimental summer camp meant to bring together privileged and

recommendations.title: Yentl
recommendations.overview: In a time when girls were forbidden to study religious scriptures, a Jewish girl masquerades as a boy to enter religious training and unexpectedly finds love along the way.

recommendations.title: Nazarín
recommendations.overview: A Catholic priest in a poor community lives a charitable life in accordance with his religious principles, but others do not return the favor.
